data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: The site adjusts seamlessly to various devices, ensuring a consistent experience across mobile, tablet, and desktop.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes CSS Media Queries, Flexible Grid System, and Viewport Meta Tag.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Employs a microservices architecture to handle various site functionalities independently.
data.technical_spec: Uses RESTful APIs and distributed services for modular design.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Employs a CDN to reduce latency and improve load times globally.
data.technical_spec: Cloudflare or Akamai integration for global content distribution.

data.title: High Availability
data.description: Designed for high availability to ensure minimal downtime through redundancy and failover strategies.
data.technical_spec: Load Balancers with multi-region server deployment.

data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Built to handle high traffic volumes with scalable cloud infrastructure solutions.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS or similar cloud platforms with auto-scaling capabilities.
